title: A Filmmaking Tool or an Existential Threat: Cannes Film Festival Weighs the Rise of AI
description: CANNES, France (AP) — The Cannes Film Festival can function like a global water cooler for movies, with prevailing issues and anxieties tending to come to the surface at the event. This year, the topic du jour is artificial intelligence.
content:
